name: CyberAgent AI Lab

when_to_use: Accessing Japanese open-source LLMs for research or production

pros: Ad-creative AI rooted in real ad-tech usage

review.verdict: Valuable as a Japanese open-model source; its APIs are niche to ad-tech partners.
review.best_for: Japanese ad agencies and research teams using calm2 or creative APIs
review.not_for: General developers wanting turnkey multilingual LLM APIs
